context: Tests PDFKit overlay guidance for weak provider ownership, visible-page lifecycle, save integration, and PencilKit boundary handling.

checklist.name: Strong Provider Ownership
checklist.description: States that PDFView.pageOverlayViewProvider is weak and the provider must be retained by a controller, SwiftUI coordinator, or another owner.

checklist.name: Overlay Creation Callback
checklist.description: Uses pdfView(_:overlayViewFor:) as the callback that creates or supplies per-page overlay views.

checklist.name: Lifecycle Persistence Callback
checklist.description: Uses pdfView(_:willEndDisplayingOverlayView:for:) or an equivalent lifecycle hook to capture overlay state before a page overlay leaves display.

checklist.name: External Per-Page State
checklist.description: Keeps overlay state in a model keyed by page or page identity rather than only inside transient overlay views.

checklist.name: Not Automatically Saved
checklist.description: States that UIKit/AppKit overlay views are not automatically written into the PDF by write(to:) or dataRepresentation().

checklist.name: Save Conversion
checklist.description: Recommends converting overlay data into PDF annotations, custom annotation appearance streams, rendered page content, or burned-in annotations before saving.

checklist.name: Burn-In Use
checklist.description: Mentions burn-in only for cases where saved annotations should become permanent page content.

checklist.name: PencilKit Boundary
checklist.description: Routes Apple Pencil canvas, tool picker, stroke, and drawing-policy details to PencilKit while keeping PDFKit responsible for overlay lifecycle and PDF persistence.
